title: potentilla crantzii var. levieri
intro: Potentilla crantzii var. levieri, also known as the Rock Cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and five-petaled leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a natural antiseptic. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Potentilla crantzii var. levieri typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, with some also using it in the form of tinctures or teas.
